title: Yagen family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Yagen family''' was a family of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]]. The [[Bovo Yagen system/Legends|Bovo Yagen system]] and the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] were named after [[Bovo Yagen]] and his children.

==Family tree==
                               [[Bovo Yagen]]
                                      |
        +---------------+-------------------+--------------+-----------------+
 [[Marenn Yagen]] [[Trellar Yagen]] [[Framesk Yagen]] [[Tava Yagen]] [[Heloan Yagen]]
